abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Brutal Impact
abilities.text: When this model uses an Impact token, reduce the raise value of that action to 3.

abilities.name: Söldnerkapitän
abilities.text: After this model receives one or more raises, it may attach an Equipment upgrade to an ally within 6" after resolving the current action.

triggers.name: Savage Blow
triggers.text: Immediately, increase this action's duel total by +2.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: "Pull!"
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place the target anywhere within 5" of its current location. One ally may declare a (missile) action targeting it.

actions.name: Toss
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This may target friendly models. Target a model of lower Sz than this model.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 10" directly away from this model. If this move is interrupted, the target and all models in base contact with it must pass a TN 14 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage. Falling does not end this movement.

triggers.name: "Give it All You Got!"
triggers.text: For each raise this attack received, move the target +3".

actions.name: Wrecking Ball
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model declares the Charge action, even if engaged, ignoring terrain, and may move up to an additional +2".

triggers.name: Bulldoze
triggers.text: Move all models in base contact with all terrain this model moved through during this action up to 3". Any models that fall are dealt +2 damage from falling.
